title: borraginoides zeylanica
intro: Borraginoides zeylanica, also known as the Sri Lankan borage or Ceylon borage, is a plant species belonging to the Boraginaceae family, native to Sri Lanka. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects. Additionally, Borraginoides zeylanica is traditionally used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders.
